title: Chapter 8 — Verification Is the Control System
CHAPTER 8 —
VERIFICATION IS THE CONTROL SYSTEM
segments.body_html:
Here is how most people think about AI-assisted work: you give the agent a task, the agent produces output, you review t

Chapter 8 — Verification Is the Control — This model is wrong for agentic work, and the error is consequential.

beats.text: Here is how most people think about AI-assisted work: you give the agent a task, the agent produces output, you review the output, you use it or don't. Review is the step at the end. This model is wrong for agentic work, and the error is consequential.

segments.label: 01 / 11 · HOOK

title: WHY THE REPORT
ISN'T EVIDENCE.
segments.body_html:
Agents produce fluent summaries of their own work. "I completed the analysis." "I verified the sources." "I confirmed th

Why the Report Isn't Evidence — Research on hallucination in large language models establishes that high-confidence prose is not correlated with accurac

beats.text: Agents produce fluent summaries of their own work. "I completed the analysis." "I verified the sources." "I confirmed the counts matched." These statements are often accurate. They are also generated by the same system that did the work. Research on hallucination in large language models establishes that high-confidence prose is not correlated with accuracy (Farquhar et al., 2024).

segments.label: 02 / 11 · WHY THE REPORT ISN'T EVIDENCE

title: WHAT INDEPENDENT EVIDENCE ACTUALLY
LOOKS LIKE.
segments.body_html: Code changes.→Research and claims.→Data transformations.→File operations.→Visual outputs.

beats.text: The evidence required depends on what the agent produced. There is no single verification method because there is no single artifact type. Code changes. If a code assertion can be tested by execution, testing by execution is the verification method. This is a categorical principle: the HumanEval benchmark formalized it, but it precedes the benchmark , any serious engineering practice already knew it (Chen et al., 2021).

segments.label: 03 / 11 · WHAT INDEPENDENT EVIDENCE ACTU

title: BUILDING VERIFICATION INTO
THE PLAN.
segments.body_html:
Every plan should end with a specific answer to the question: how will we know the task is complete?

Building Verification Into the Plan — If the agent cannot name an evidence method, or if the method it names amounts to "I'll confirm when I'm done," the plan

beats.text: Every plan should end with a specific answer to the question: how will we know the task is complete? If the agent cannot name an evidence method, or if the method it names amounts to "I'll confirm when I'm done," the plan is not ready to approve. A simple prompt addition enforces this: "Before acting, tell me what evidence will show the task is complete. If there is no reliable verification path for this task, stop and ask me."

segments.label: 04 / 11 · BUILDING VERIFICATION INTO THE

segments.section: FOUR METHODS, FOUR LEVELS OF I
title: FOUR METHODS, FOUR LEVELS
OF INDEPENDENCE.
segments.body_html: Self-check→Second-model review→Automated testing→Human or source verification

beats.text: Self-check, second-model review, automated testing, and human verification are sometimes treated as interchangeable. They are not, and understanding why matters for knowing when each is adequate. Self-check is the agent reviewing its own output. It catches surface contradictions. It cannot catch systematic errors that affected the original work, cannot access sources the model lacks, and shares the same failure modes as the original generation. Useful for obvious errors. Not evidence for consequential outputs.

segments.label: 05 / 11 · FOUR METHODS, FOUR LEVELS OF I

title: A WORKED TRACE:
LITERATURE SUMMARY
segments.body_html:
A researcher asks an agent to summarize the literature on a specific treatment protocol, citing the key studies and thei

A Worked Trace: Literature Summary — Before the agent starts: The researcher adds to the task: "Before acting, tell me how you'll verify the summary is accur

beats.text: A researcher asks an agent to summarize the literature on a specific treatment protocol, citing the key studies and their findings. Before the agent starts: The researcher adds to the task: "Before acting, tell me how you'll verify the summary is accurate. I need to know which documents you'll read, and at the end I need a source map showing which claim comes from which document."

segments.label: 06 / 11 · A WORKED TRACE: LITERATURE SUM

title: WHEN TO REJECT
A TASK.
segments.body_html:
Some tasks do not have a reliable verification path. There are signals:

When to Reject a Task — The agent's output cannot be traced to specific sources or data — pure synthesis tasks where no citation trail is possib

beats.text: Some tasks do not have a reliable verification path. There are signals: The agent's output cannot be traced to specific sources or data , pure synthesis tasks where no citation trail is possible. The tools required to verify the output are not available to the human. The task requires domain expertise the human does not have and no expert reviewer is in the loop. The task involves external-facing action that cannot be reviewed before it happens.

segments.label: 07 / 11 · WHEN TO REJECT A TASK

title: VERIFICATION TIERING
segments.body_html:
Like the access ladder in Chapter 3, verification should be risk-tiered.

Verification Tiering — Light verification applies to low-risk, reversible, narrow tasks: a draft for internal use only, a summary for working p

beats.text: Like the access ladder in Chapter 3, verification should be risk-tiered. Light verification applies to low-risk, reversible, narrow tasks: a draft for internal use only, a summary for working purposes, a file organization proposal not yet executed. Light verification means reading the output critically and confirming it is consistent with the inputs provided.

segments.label: 08 / 11 · VERIFICATION TIERING

title: THE APPROVAL GATE
BEFORE USE.
segments.body_html:
The final gate is the moment before the output is used, transmitted, or acted on. At that gate the human should be able

The Approval Gate Before Use — What evidence method was applied to this output? Did the evidence check pass, partially pass, or identify errors? Were a

beats.text: The final gate is the moment before the output is used, transmitted, or acted on. At that gate the human should be able to answer four questions: What evidence method was applied to this output? Did the evidence check pass, partially pass, or identify errors? Were any errors corrected, and is the correction documented? Is there any claim or element in this output that could not be verified?

segments.label: 09 / 11 · THE APPROVAL GATE BEFORE USE
